meta.title: The US Army's new answer to drone swarms: LEONIDAS
meta.description:
The US Army just picked up two new $20 million drone-zapping microwave weapons for testing with its Rapid Capabilities and Critical Technologies Office, and if they work as advertised, they’ll be big trouble for adversary drone swarms — and the portion of the internet that’s convinced these small drones are the answer to every battlefield conundrum.
